content.en:
North Desert River.

Ye Tian entered here from Taichu Mountain, time and space were distorted, and he crossed the endless distance in one step, leaving the Origin Realm Sea and coming to the Northern Wilderness River in the depths of nowhere.

At this time.

Ye Tian clearly felt that the distance between his replica body and the real body of the body was extremely far away, and even the sensing was much weaker.

"The strength of the Primal Ancestor is too terrifying, it can easily connect the Primal Mountain and the Northern Wilderness River, is this the strength that surpasses the Ten Realm-level controllers?"

Ye Tian muttered.

There is a special force in the Northern Wilderness River, which oppresses the Eternal Masters, or rather, the outsiders.

But Ye Tian felt okay, the strength to suppress was not much, but the will was suppressed layer by layer, so the scope of being able to explore here was not large.

Ye Tian walked on the Beihuang River and did not feel the abundant resources.

"That's right, although there are not many eternal controllers from the Northern Wilderness River, it is definitely not too few, and it takes time for resources to be born, and it is impossible for this place to still be in the state of resources everywhere. Ye Tian thought to himself.

His purpose this time was not to find the resources of the Beihuang River, it was too much luck to find resources that would help him, and it was a waste of time.

His purpose is to hunt the Northern Desolation Beasts!

The core of the Northern Desolation Beast has the effect of refining the primordial-level control body, even if the effect is weak, but if there are enough of them, it is also very good.

The reason why the other Eternal Masters did not dare to come and hunt the Northern Desolation Beast was because this was the home of the Northern Desolation Beast, and it was easy to be surrounded by the Northern Desolation Beast.

After all, the wisdom of the Northern Desolation Beast is not low, and it is also a race, once it is attacked, it will inevitably ask for help.

And the perception of the Northern Desolation Beast in the Northern Desolate River is even more powerful than that of the Eternal Controllers, maybe the Eternal Masters did not perceive the Northern Desolation Beast, and the Northern Desolation Beast perceived the Eternal Controller.

At that time, it will not be the Eternal Master who hunts the Northern Desolation Beast, but the Northern Desolation Beast who hunts the Eternal Master.

However, Ye Tian is different.

The Northern Desolate Beast must have a talent, and Ye Tian's copying talent can easily gain insight into the location of the Northern Desolate Beast, as well as spy on the opponent's strength and aura, so as to lock on the weaker Northern Desolate Beast for hunting, and can easily escape from the encirclement.

That's his strength.

"Copy the talent, open!"

Ye Tian's copying talent power spread, enveloping the surrounding territory, looking for traces of the Northern Desolate Beast.

"Six Northern Desolation Beasts!"

Ye Tian sensed the talents of the six Northern Desolation Beasts, and he could roughly sense their strength.

The strength of one of these six Northern Desolate Beasts should have reached the strength of the Nine Realm-level controllers, Ye Tian was not necessarily its opponent, so it was impossible to kill it.

Among them, the four Northern Desolate Beasts are the strength of the Eight Realm-level masters, and it is possible to kill them, but they may not be able to kill them in one move.

Because the Nine Realms level controller was not too far away, the support speed must be very fast.

If you can't kill the opponent with one move, the Northern Desolation Beast with the strength of the Nine Realms level controller will descend and attack him.

"There is also a Northern Desolation Beast with the strength of a Seven Realms level master, it is very weak, I can kill it in an instant, and then leave this area!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Therefore, he was ready to attack this Northern Desolation Beast with the strength of the Seven Realms level controller.

Soon.

He came to the other party's neighborhood, and he restrained his breath and tried not to be discovered by the other party.

However, when approaching each other, it was still perceived.

However, this does not affect anything.

"Nine flashes of thunder!"

Ye Tian's body flashed with thunder, and he crossed layers of time and space and descended on the other party's side.

Then, the space-time cracking blade appeared in Ye Tian's hand, and everything was instantaneous.

This top-notch origin control technique directly cut through the body of the Northern Desolation Beast and killed him instantly.

After all, although Ye Tian was an eight-realm-level controller, he could exert the combat power of a nine-realm-level controller, and killing a Northern Desolation beast at the level of seven-realm controller's combat power was naturally a matter of seconds.

After killing this Northern Desolation Beast at the level of the Seven Realms Controller, Ye Tian reached out and grabbed it, directly probed into its body, and grabbed a beast core.

As for the corpse of the Northern Desolate Beast at the level of the Seven Realms Controller, Ye Tian was useless.

Moreover, with a corpse, it is easy to be spied on, after all, the Northern Desolation Beast may be able to perceive the corpse of its companion, but just a beast core, it is not much of a problem.

Swish!

Ye Tian left quickly, and erased his traces of time and space.

And not long after Ye Tian left, a huge Northern Desolate Beast came, and when he saw the corpse of this Seven Realm-level Northern Desolation Beast, he was immediately extremely angry.

"Damn, it's the ones who control it again!"

The Northern Desolate Beast roared angrily, and immediately probed the surroundings, looking for traces of the enemy.

However, it came late and could not find any trace of the other party.

After roaring for a while, it had no choice but to leave.

......

"Didn't chase it!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Immediately, he continued to hunt the Northern Desolation Beast with the combat power of the Seven Realms level controller first, and if he encountered a lone Northern Desolation beast at the level of the Eight Realms master, he would also take action.

In this way, as time passed, Ye Tian accumulated more and more Northern Desolation Beast Cores.

A year of the Boundary River!

Two Realms of the River Year!

Unconsciously, hundreds of boundary years have passed.

There are indeed a lot of Northern Desolate Beasts in the Northern Desolate River, but sometimes Ye Tian can't find a chance, but he slowly looks for an opportunity, and in these hundreds of Boundary River years, he finally hunted tens of thousands of Northern Desolate Beasts.

And because he had hunted too many Northern Desolation Beasts, it caused many Northern Desolate Beasts with Nine Realm-level master-level combat power to be furious, and even the Northern Desolate Beast Ancestor of the Ten Realm-level Masters came out.

The Northern Desolation Beast has a Ten-Realm Controller-level Ancestor-level Ancestor, but there is only this one, and it usually hardly appears, but this time it also came out.

Ye Tian sensed that something was wrong, so he immediately came out.

I'm afraid that for a long time, no Eternal Controller will dare to enter the Northern Wilderness River.

This period of time is estimated to be a forbidden place, not a treasure land!

And Ye Tian, the initiator, was very happy, because he had gained too much.

Not only did he hunt so many Northern Desolation beasts, but he also found a lot of resources, and his net worth skyrocketed.

There are some cultivation places in Taichu Mountain, Ye Tian lived in a cultivation place here, built a cave by himself, and practiced in retreat here, not preparing to go out for the time being.

Inside the cave.

Ye Tian began to cultivate, he took out the beast cores of the Northern Desolation Beasts, and immediately urged the primordial-level control body to begin refining the beast cores of these Northern Desolation Beasts.

Gradually, Ye Tian's primordial-level control body began to rise.
